PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?songwriter WHERE {
  ?contestant wdt:P178 wd:Q15434705 ; wdt:P1201 ?placement .
  FILTER(STR(?placement) IN("8" , "9" , "10"))
  ?contestant wdt:P2198 ?song .
  ?song wdt:P175 ?songwriter .
}
